# xdgfile

Package xdgfile provides a store.Store adapter backed by a flat JSON
object on disk, located via xdgpath.

## Reference

- API: <https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/dangernoodle-io/mcpkit/store/xdgfile>
- Guide: [xdgfile guide](https://github.com/dangernoodle-io/mcpkit/wiki/Store-Xdgfile)
